title: neomolinia mandshurica
intro: Neomolinia mandshurica, also known as Devil's Claw, is a flowering plant native to Asia and Africa, whose roots are used for medicinal purposes. The plant's roots contain iridoid glycosides, which are responsible for its anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties. These medicinal properties have been found to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism and arthritis symptoms, and promoting digestive health. Neomolinia mandshurica can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support overall well-being.
